summary: Wire the existing Fact Finder meeting form (Meeting1.tsx) to persist data to the sales.sales_factfinder table via the data layer. Currently all form state is local useState with hardcoded defaults and no save behavior. This work packet creates: (1) TypeScript types for the factfinder schema in src/data/types/, (2) query functions in src/data/queries/ to insert/update sales_factfinder rows keyed by sales_id, (3) a service module in src/app/meetings/meeting1/ that orchestrates the save — minting a sales_id via sales.sales_state if one does not exist, then upserting the factfinder row, (4) updates to Meeting1.tsx to call the service on form submission and load existing data when a sales_id is present. Error handling writes to sales.sales_factfinder_errors. All database access flows through src/data/ — no direct Supabase calls from UI.

form_fields_to_persist.employee_count: totalEmployees state variable → sales_factfinder.employee_count (cast to INT)
form_fields_to_persist.renewal_month: renewalMonth state variable → sales_factfinder.renewal_month (cast to INT)

form_fields_not_persisted_yet.note: The current form captures ~30 fields (address, contact info, funding type, benefits, compliance items, tier costs, etc.) but the canonical table only has 4 data columns. Additional columns require a column_registry.yml update + ADR if schema expansion is needed. This work packet wires only the 4 declared columns.

imo_layer_mapping.ingress: Meeting1.tsx form submission — schema validation via Zod before passing to M layer
imo_layer_mapping.middle: src/app/meetings/meeting1/ — orchestrates sales_id minting + factfinder upsert + error logging
imo_layer_mapping.egress: Toast notification to UI on success/failure — no external egress

implementation_notes: Use Supabase client from src/sys/integrations/supabase/client.ts for database access
Wrap database calls in src/data/queries/ — UI never imports Supabase directly
Service in src/app/meetings/meeting1/ owns the transaction logic (mint sales_id → upsert factfinder)
On error, append to sales.sales_factfinder_errors with process_id and payload
Use react-query mutation in the UI for optimistic updates and cache invalidation
Load existing factfinder data when sales_id is available (read path)
